untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external input: (1) 'Trusted contrarian trader signals' — contrarian sentiment/positioning data not in allowed indicators; (2) 'Corroborating fundamental news' — external news/events require data source outside technical indicators; (3) 'Original bias duration > 5 periods' — requires tracking external trader's position history. These dependencies cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. Approximated entry as price stall (low body) + weak trend (low ADX), but this misses the core contrarian signal logic.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about tracking an external trader's position changes and correlating with news events. Used body < 0.5 to approximate 'consecutive periods of flat/stalling action' and adx_14 < 25 to detect weak trend conviction. Exit uses pivot-based reversal as proxy for 'next technical level.' Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per source spec, but cannot be operationalized without external sentiment/news feed.
